name: [GRV-API] Django ORM Performance Monitor
message:
Django ORM performance degradation detected.

Database: {{django.db.vendor}}
Database Name: {{django.db.name}}
P95 Query Duration: {{trace.django.db.query.duration.p95}}ms
Environment: {{env}}
Service: {{service}}

Database Performance Impact:
- High query response times affecting user experience
- Potential database resource contention
- May indicate missing indexes or inefficient queries

Investigation Steps:
1. Check database performance: https://app.datadoghq.com/apm/services/grv-api?env=prod&view=resources
2. Review slow query logs
3. Check database connection pool usage
4. Analyze query execution plans
5. Consider database optimization or scaling

Database Dashboard: https://app.datadoghq.com/apm/services/grv-api/resources?env=prod&resource=database

options.escalation_message: Django ORM performance continues to degrade. Application performance severely impacted.
